'''lovagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icehearted|icehearted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icehearted|icehearted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lovagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovagithi|lovagithi]] || [[word:lovagiji|lovagiji]] || [[word:lovagishi|lovagishi]] || [[word:lovagiki|lovagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovaguthuthu|lovaguthuthu]] || [[word:lovagujuju|lovagujuju]] || [[word:lovagushushu|lovagushushu]] || [[word:lovagukuku|lovagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovaguthu|lovaguthu]] || [[word:lovaguju|lovaguju]] || [[word:lovagushu|lovagushu]] || [[word:lovaguku|lovaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovagufthuf|lovagufthuf]] || [[word:lovagufjuf|lovagufjuf]] || [[word:lovagufshuf|lovagufshuf]] || [[word:lovagufkuf|lovagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovagethe|lovagethe]] || [[word:lovageje|lovageje]] || [[word:lovageshe|lovageshe]] || [[word:lovageke|lovageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovagothotho|lovagothotho]] || [[word:lovagojojo|lovagojojo]] || [[word:lovagoshosho|lovagoshosho]] || [[word:lovagokoko|lovagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovagotho|lovagotho]] || [[word:lovagojo|lovagojo]] || [[word:lovagosho|lovagosho]] || [[word:lovagoko|lovagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovagofthof|lovagofthof]] || [[word:lovagofjof|lovagofjof]] || [[word:lovagofshof|lovagofshof]] || [[word:lovagofkof|lovagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfthÃŸf|lovagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfjÃŸf|lovagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfshÃŸf|lovagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfkÃŸf|lovagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lovagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lovagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lovagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lovagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfthÃŸf|lovagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfjÃŸf|lovagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfshÃŸf|lovagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfkÃŸf|lovagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfthÃŸf|lovagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfjÃŸf|lovagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfshÃŸf|lovagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovagÃŸfkÃŸf|lovagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovagÃḊthÃḊ|lovagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lovagÃḊjÃḊ|lovagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lovagÃḊshÃḊ|lovagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lovagÃḊkÃḊ|lovagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovagathatha|lovagathatha]] || [[word:lovagajaja|lovagajaja]] || [[word:lovagashasha|lovagashasha]] || [[word:lovagakaka|lovagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovagatha|lovagatha]] || [[word:lovagaja|lovagaja]] || [[word:lovagasha|lovagasha]] || [[word:lovagaka|lovagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovagafthaf|lovagafthaf]] || [[word:lovagafjaf|lovagafjaf]] || [[word:lovagafshaf|lovagafshaf]] || [[word:lovagafkaf|lovagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lovagasha|lovagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovagshÃḋsha|lovagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovagrosha|lovagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovagmusha|lovagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovagyasha|lovagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovagnkshÃḋsha|golovagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovagnkrosha|golovagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovagnkmusha|golovagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovagnkyasha|golovagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lovavagasha|lovavagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovavagshÃḋsha|lovavagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovavagrosha|lovavagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovavagmusha|lovavagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovavagyasha|lovavagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovavagnkshÃḋsha|golovavagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovavagnkrosha|golovavagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovavagnkmusha|golovavagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovavagnkyasha|golovavagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:levÃḊgasha|levÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:levÃḊgshÃḋsha|levÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:levÃḊgrosha|levÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:levÃḊgmusha|levÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:levÃḊgyasha|levÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golevÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|golevÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golevÃḊgnkrosha|golevÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golevÃḊgnkmusha|golevÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golevÃḊgnkyasha|golevÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lovfagasha|lovfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovfagshÃḋsha|lovfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovfagrosha|lovfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovfagmusha|lovfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovfagyasha|lovfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovfagnkshÃḋsha|golovfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovfagnkrosha|golovfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovfagnkmusha|golovfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovfagnkyasha|golovfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
